content:
[Intro]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
   Show me the meaning of being lonely[/tab]

   [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
   So many words for the broken heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
   It's hard to see in a crimson love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]C#[/ch]
   So hard to breathe Walk with me, and maybe[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
   Nights of light so soon become[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
   Wild and free I could feel the sun[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]C#[/ch]
   Your every wish will be done[/tab]
   
   They tell me...


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
   Show me the meaning of being lonely[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
   Is this the feeling I need to walk with[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
   Tell me why I can't be there where you are[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
   There's something missing in my heart[/tab]


[Interlude]

   [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] 


[Verse 2]

[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
   Life goes on as it never ends[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
   Eyes of stone observe the trends[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]C#[/ch]
   They never say forever gaze, If only...[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
   Guilty roads to an endless love (endless love)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
   There's no control, Are you with me now?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]C#[/ch]
   Your every wish will be done[/tab]

   They tell me


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
   Show me the meaning of being lonely[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
   Is this the feeling I need to walk with  (tell me why)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
   Tell me why I can't be there where you are[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]
   There's something missing in my     heart[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
   There's nowhere to run[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#[/ch]
   I have no  place to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
   Surrender my heart, body and soul[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]D#sus4[/ch]     
   How can it be you're asking me to feel[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D#[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]

[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]   [ch]G#mM7[/ch]  [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#[/ch]
                                      You are missing in my[/tab]

heart                 Tell me why can't I be there where you are[/tab]
